hero.title: About Delgar
hero.subtitle: High-quality frozen meats for the Delgar Fam—trusted from source to table.

story.title: Built for families and partners who value quality
paragraphs: Delgar Store is a locally trusted provider of high-quality frozen meat products, serving households, small businesses, and food partners who value freshness and reliability.
We carefully select our products and follow proper storage and handling practices to ensure that quality, taste, and safety are preserved from sourcing to store.

Built for the Delgar Fam, our goal is to make dependable frozen meats accessible and easy to choose. As we continue to grow, we remain committed to consistency, transparency, and delivering products that families and partners can rely on every day.

items.title: Quality & Safety
items.description: Every product is selected and handled under strict standards so you get the best taste and safety.

items.title: Trust & Transparency
items.description: We believe in honest sourcing and clear practices—no shortcuts, just reliability you can count on.

items.title: Family First
items.description: We exist to serve the Delgar Fam—households and partners who deserve consistent, great-tasting frozen meats.

connect.title: Connect with us
connect.subtitle: Follow us for updates, tips, and news from Delgar.
